consumer_electronics.title: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn rocket
consumer_electronics.summary: Today's launch of AST SpaceMobile's BlueBird 7 satellite aboard Blue Origin's reusable New Glenn rocket was a partial success. The New Glenn touched down on its landing pad without incident, making it the second launch and landing for the first stage booster, and officially giving Jeff Bezos a reusable launch vehicle.

channel_news.title: Retailers like Pact, MaryRuth’s and Ollie turn customer experience into a growth function
channel_news.summary: For years, the business case for customer experience was defensive: keep costs down, handle volume and prevent complaints from going viral.
